General.Name: Bonny International Holding Ltd
General.Description: Bonny International Holding Limited, an investment holding company, design, research, develops, produces, and sells intimate wear products. It operates in two segments, Original Design Manufacture (ODM) Products and Brand Products. The ODM Products segment manufactures and sells seamless underwear or other ODM products to overseas customers or their agents. The Brand Products segment manufactures and sells ladies brassieres, panties, thermal underwear, under the Bonny and U+Bonny brand names. It also offers functional sportswear; operates self-operated retail outlets comprising self-operated concession counters and standalone stores; and franchised retail outlets covering provinces, municipalities, and autonomous regions in the People's Republic of China. In addition, the company provides its products through its e-commerce network and various e-commerce platforms. It operates in Mainland China, the United States, Germany, Canada, the Netherlands, Mexico, Britain, Australia, and Korea, internationally. Bonny International Holding Limited was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 118 Connaught Road West, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
